edit_bet_cashout_value.value: Editing uses the cashout value of this bet

never_reveal_your_pin.value: Always ensure the URL is www.sportybet.com before inputting your PIN. Never reveal your PIN to anyone even if they claim to represent SportyBet.

no_game.value: Sorry, there are no games currently available in this category. Please try later. Thank you.

restart_hint.value: App will restart when changing the region. Please be patient.

sim_mode_off_info.value: Your betslip is in SIM mode. To proceed with editing, we will switch it to REAL mode. Your current selections will be deleted. Do you want to continue?

processing.value: Available by end of day Monday

dynamic_market_info_text.value:
To enhance the betting experience,
 we provide alternative market options when the original ones are no longer available for placing bets.

maintenance_error_description.value: Sorry for the inconvenience. We're performing some maintenance at the moment and will be back online shortly. Please try again later.

out_of_region_error_description.value: You are visiting from a prohibited jurisdiction. Currently we only accept customers from Ghana, Nigeria, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia. Or you can visit Sporty.com for the ultimate live sports experience.

due_to_inactivity_your_session_will_expi.value: Due to inactivity, your session will expire soon and you will be automatically logged out.

your_limits_have_been_reached.value: Your limits have been reached. Bettor limits may limit placing bets and the time you spend at SportyBet.

your_vlimit_have_been_reached_time.value: Your {limit} have been reached. You will not be able to navigate through SportyBet until your limit resets or is adjusted by you.

your_vlimit_have_been_reached_others.value: Your {limit} have been reached. You will not be able to place additional bets until your limit resets or is adjusted by you.

facial_recognition_desc.value: Let’s now proceed to a quick Facial Recognition in order for you to start enjoying the best products and services again!

an_error_occurred_during_your_facial_rec.value: An error occurred during your facial recognition. Kindly retry and follow the instructions, if you experience added difficulties, do not hesitate to reach out to our support team.

coming_soon_web_dialog_description.value: This feature is not ready in our WEB version. Please access mobile version to get the full experience.

enter_password_description.value: To access sensitive info, enter your old password to verify your identity.

facial_recognition_error_msg.value: An error occurred during your Facial Recognition process. Try again and follow the instructions. If this error persists, please reach out to our support team for further assistance.
